Playlist: 100 Days of Machine Learning | CampusX
Channel: CampusX

#0 What is Machine Learning?
#1 AI Vs ML Vs DL for Beginners in Hindi
#2 Types of Machine Learning for Beginners (Supervised Learning, Unsupervised Learning, Semi Supervised Learning)
#3 Batch Machine Learning
#4 Online Machine Learning (How Does Online Ml Works?, When Should You Use Online Ml?, River Library, Vowpal Wabbit, Out Of Core Learning, Disadvantages Of Online Ml)
#5 Instance (Model Based Learning, Differences)
#6 Challenges in Machine Learning (Data Collection, Insufficient Data, Non Representative Data, Poor Quality Data, Irrelevant Features, Overfitting, Underfitting, Software Integration, Offline Learning/Deployment, Cost Involved)
#7 Application of Machine Learning (Application In Retail Sector, Banking And Finance, Transportation, Manufacturing, Consumer Internet, Imdb Movie Review Application)
#8 Machine Learning Development Life Cycle (Background Of The Topic, What Is Software Development Life Cycle, Framing The Problem, Gathering The Data, Data Pre-Processing, Eda, Feature Engineering And Selection, Model Training Evaluation And Selection, Model Deployment, Beta Testing, Optimizing The Model)
#9 Data Engineer Vs Data Analyst Vs Data Scientist Vs ML Engineer (Various Data Based Job Roles, Comparison)
#10 What are Tensors (1d Tensor/Vector, 2d Tensor/Matrices, Nd Tensors, Rank Axes And Shape, Example Of 1d Tensor, Example Of 2d Tensor, Example Of 3d Tensor, Example Of 4d Tensor, Example Of 5d Tensor)
#11 Installing Anaconda For Data Science (Spyder, Jupyter Notebook, Virtual Environment, Using Kaggle, Google Collab)
#12 End to End Toy Project (Plan Of Attack, Preprocessing, Eda, Scatterplot Example, Feature Selection, Extracting Input And Output Columns, Train Test Split, Evaluating The Model, Accuracy Score, Exporting The Model, Deploying The Model On Cloud)
#13 How to Frame a Machine Learning Problem (To Framing The Problem, Case Study Example Of Netflix For Churn Rate, Business Problem To Ml Problem, Types Of Problem, Current Solution, Getting Data, Metrics To Measure, Online Vs Batch?, Check Assumptions)
#14 Working with CSV files (Process Of Gathering Data, Different Types Of File Formats, Code Demo With Jupyter Notebook, Methods To Handle Csv Files)
#15 Working with JSON/SQL
#16 Fetching Data From an API (What Is An Api?, Getting Tmdb Data With Api, Code Demo, Uploading Dataset On Kaggle)
#17 Fetching data using Web Scraping
#18 Understanding Your Data (How Big Is The Data?, How Does The Data Looks Like?, What Is The Data Type Of Columns?, Are There Any Missing Values?, How Does The Data Looks Mathematically?, Are There Any Duplicate Values?, How Is The Corelation Between The Columns?)
#19 EDA using Univariate Analysis (What Is Univariate Analysis, Types Of Data, Code Demo On Titanic Dataset, Countplot, Piechart, Working With Numerical Data, Distplot, Boxplot)
#20 EDA using Bivariate and Multivariate Analysis (Scatterplot Numerical To Numerical, Bar Plot Numerical To Categorical, Box Plot Numerical To Categorical, Distplot Numerical To Categorical, Heatmap Categorical To Categorical, Clustermap Categorical To Categorical, Pairplot, Lineplot Numerical To Numerical)
#21 Pandas Profiling
#22 What is Feature Engineering (Missing Values Imputation, Handling Categorical Values, Outlier Detection, Feature Scaling, Feature Construction, Feature Selection, Feature Extraction)
#23 Feature Scaling (Standardization Intuition, Code Example And Impact Of Outliers, Why Scaling Is Important?, When Should You Use Standardization?)
#24 Feature Scaling (What Is Normalization, Minmaxscaling Intuition, Code Example, Mean Normalization, Maxabsscaling, Robust Scaling, Normalization Vs Standardization)
#25 Encoding Categorical Data (Revision, What Is Ordinal Data, Label Encoding, How Ordinal Encoding Works?, Code Example)
#26 One Hot Encoding (Revision, Dummy Variable Trap, Ohe Using Most Frequent Variables, Code Example, Code Example Using Sklearn)
#27 Column Transformer in Machine Learning
#28 Machine Learning Pipelines A (Sklearn Pipelines, Example Through Titanic Dataset, Train/Test/Split, Applying Imputation, Pickling The Model, Strategy For The Pipeline, Creating Pipeline, Pipeline Vs Make_pipeline, Explore The Pipeline, Cross Validation Using Pipeline)
#29 Function Transformer (Revision Mathematical Transformations, How To Find If The Data Is Normal?, Qq Plots, Log Transform, Three More Transforms, Reciprocal Transform, Square Transform, Example With Titanic Dataset)
#30 Power Transformer (Revision, Box Cox Transform, Yeo Johnson Transform, Code Example)
#31 Binning and Binarization (Encoding Numerical Features, What Is Discretization?, Types Of Discretization, Equal Width/Uniform Binning, Equal Frequency Quantile Binning, Kmeans Binning, Encoding The Discretized Variable, Example Thorugh Code, Custom/Domain Based Binning, Example)
#32 Handling Mixed Variables
#33 Handling Date and Time Variables
#34 Handling Missing Data (Complete Case Analysis Cca, Assumption For Cca, Advantages And Disadvantages Of Cca, When To Use Cca?, Code Example)
#35 Handling missing data (Mean Median Imputation, Code Demo, Imputation Using Sklearn, Arbitarry Value Imputation, End Of Distribution Imputation)
#36 Handling Missing Categorical Data
#37 Missing Indicator (Revision, What Is Random Imputation?, Code Demo Using Titanic Dataset, Automatically Selecting Value For Imputation)
#38 KNN Imputer (Difference Between Univariate And Multivariate Imputation, Nan Euclidean Distance Documentation, Code Demo, Concept Of Uniform And Distance)
#39 Multivariate Imputation by Chained Equations for Missing Value (How Mice Works?, Code)
#40 What are Outliers (When Should You Remove Outliers?, The Effects Of Outliers In Ml Algorithms, How To Treat Outliers?, How To Detect Outliers?, Techniques For Outlier Detection And Removal)

#42 Outlier Detection and Removal using the IQR Method
#43 Outlier Detection using the Percentile Method
#44 Feature Construction
#45 Curse of Dimensionality

#48 Principle Component Analysis(PCA) (Practical Example On Mnist Dataset, Pca Code Demo, 2d Visualization, Explained Variance, Finding Optimum Number Of Principle Components Required, When Does Pca Not Work?)

#128 K

#131 DBSCAN Clustering Algorithms (00:31, 03:59 Why Dbscan?, 06:28 What Is Density Based Clustering?, 08:41 Epsilon Example, 14:12 Types Of Points In Dbscan, 17:58 Density Connected Points, 25:20 Dbscan Algorithm, 28:55 Dbscan Demo, 32:40 Limitations, 34:00 Visualization Tool, 34:15)

#133 Hyperparameter Tuning using Optuna
